name: Read-only roles cannot write controls (exception 01)
hypothesis: A read-only owner/vendor session that attempts a control write must be denied at authz with exception 01 and NOTHING else: no partial success, no different code that would hint at the register map.
expected: Every control write as ReadOnlySunSpec or LexaVoltReadOnly returns Modbus exception 01 (Wrote=false); reads are unaffected.
fix: If a write is accepted or a different code returned, look at lexa-mbaps' RBAC overlay evaluation (bitwise deny, ruling C13) and the role extracted from the client cert (design 01 3.1: role errors collapse to no-role at authz).
notes: The full grant/deny matrix across all five roles + the malformed-role certs is T06.8; this campaign proves the two read-only roles' denial path (ReadOnly then, mid-campaign, LexaVolt).
